name: Allen & Allen Inc
description_short: Allen & Allen Inc is a credit repair provider based in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania. Rated 4.4/5 on Google.
description_long:
Allen & Allen Inc is a credit repair provider serving clients in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania. The company serves consumers in the Philadelphia area who are looking to repair and improve their credit scores.

Allen & Allen Inc specializes in credit repair services designed to help consumers repair and improve their credit scores. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in Philadelphia, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. Allen & Allen Inc operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Philadelphia, Pennsylvania area who are considering Allen & Allen Inc should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
